title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hitachi India South Asia Partners - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Hitachi India South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Howrah. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hitachi India South Asia Partners:
Hitachi India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India South Asia Partners!
